named-query.name: Vehicle.findByPlate
named-query.query: select v from Vehicle v where v.plateNumber = ?1

named-query.name: WorkOrder.findByIds
named-query.query: select w from WorkOrder w where w.id in ?1

named-query.name: WorkOrder.findByClientNif
named-query.query: SELECT w FROM WorkOrder w WHERE w.vehicle.client.nif = ?1

named-query.name: WorkOrder.findNotInvoicedByClientNif
named-query.query: SELECT w FROM WorkOrder w WHERE w.vehicle.client.nif = ?1 AND w.invoice IS NULL AND w.state = uo.ri.cws.domain.WorkOrder$WorkOrderState.FINISHED

named-query.name: WorkOrder.findByPlateNumber
named-query.query: SELECT w FROM WorkOrder w WHERE w.vehicle.plateNumber = ?1

named-query.name: PaymentMean.findByInvoiceId
named-query.query: select m from Invoice f join f.workOrders w join w.vehicle.client c join c.paymentMeans m where f.id = ?1

named-query.name: Mechanic.findByNif
named-query.query: select m from Mechanic m where m.nif = ?1

named-query.name: Invoice.findByNumber
named-query.query: select f from Invoice f where f.number = ?1

named-query.name: Invoice.getNextInvoiceNumber
named-query.query: select cast( coalesce(max(f.number) + 1, 1L) as bigint ) from Invoice f

named-query.name: Contract.findAllInForce
named-query.query: SELECT c FROM Contract c WHERE c.state = :state

named-query.name: Payroll.findByContract
named-query.query: SELECT p FROM Payroll p WHERE p.contract.id = :cid ORDER BY p.date DESC

named-query.name: Payroll.findLastMonthPayrolls
named-query.query: SELECT p FROM Payroll p WHERE p.date BETWEEN :start AND :end ORDER BY p.date DESC

named-query.name: Payroll.findLastPayrollByMechanicId
named-query.query: SELECT p FROM Payroll p WHERE p.contract.mechanic.id = :mid ORDER BY p.date DESC

named-query.name: Payroll.findByProfessionalGroupName
named-query.query: SELECT p FROM Payroll p WHERE p.contract.professionalGroup.name = :name ORDER BY p.date DESC

named-query.name: Payroll.findByMechanicId
named-query.query: SELECT p FROM Payroll p WHERE p.contract.mechanic.id = :mid ORDER BY p.date DESC

named-query.name: Payroll.findByContractIdAndDate
named-query.query: SELECT p FROM Payroll p WHERE p.contract.id = :cid AND p.date = :date

named-query.name: ProfessionalGroup.findByName
named-query.query: SELECT pg FROM ProfessionalGroup pg WHERE pg.name = :name
